# v0.6 Host-led Dogfood Transcript

User:
Make the v0.6 host-led Engineering Control Room flow prove itself. Start from
this request, bind it to the existing GitHub issue, use the minimum context,
delegate review, reach signoff before implementation, and close the tracker
with evidence.

@host:
Classification: persistent-workorder
Reason:
- This is milestone validation for v0.6.
- It must bind GitHub Issue, WorkOrder, gate thread, branch, PR, Evidence
  Packet, and tracker row.
Confirmation required: yes

WorkOrder draft: WO-0212
- GitHub Issue: #212
- Phase: v0.6.0 - Engineering Control Room
- Epic: Evidence / Tracker Closure
- Tracker: #202 / #212
- Required evidence: dogfood transcript, WorkOrder, ContextPack, Evidence
  Packet, tracker update, PR link

Required sources:
- coreroom-architecture: docs/architecture.md
- sdlc-gates: docs/sdlc-gates.md
- v06-tracker: https://github.com/spytensor/CoreRoom/issues/202
- pr-template: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

ContextPack: CTX-WO-0212
- @engineer receives architecture and PR-template slices.
- @reviewer receives SDLC gate, tracker, and PR-template slices.
- @qa receives SDLC gate and PR-template slices.
- No role receives every registered source by default.

Delegate @engineer:
Use the architecture and PR-template context to verify the fixture models prove
the implementation-facing path without adding a user command.

Delegate @reviewer:
Use the SDLC gate, tracker, and PR-template context to verify completion cannot
be claimed until tracker checkbox and Evidence Ledger are updated.

Gate phase: discovery
Evidence: required sources and context slices identified.

Gate phase: plan
Evidence: WorkOrder WO-0212 and ContextPack CTX-WO-0212 drafted.

Gate phase: review
Evidence: @engineer and @reviewer both have scoped delegation.

Gate phase: signoff
Evidence: host confirms scoped context, tracker closure rule, and rollback
requirements before implementation starts.

Gate phase: implement
Evidence: deterministic fixtures and v0.6 dogfood test are added.

Gate phase: qa
Evidence: cargo test --test v06_host_led_dogfood --quiet passes.

Evidence Packet: WO-0212
- Pull Request: #228
- GitHub Issue: #212
- Branch: feat/v0.6-212-host-led-dogfood-validation
- Gate thread: thread-v06-dogfood

Tracker closure: #202 / #212
- Checkbox: checked after PR merge.
- Evidence Ledger: PR #228, merged, validation evidence, tracker updated yes.
- M-AC-10: checked after dogfood proof merges.

Remaining risks:
- This default dogfood does not call paid live engines.
- GitHub CI evidence is attached by the completing PR after it opens.

Rollback:
Revert PR #228; no migration or persisted runtime state change.
